title: Duel on Tatooine (disambiguation)
content:
'''Duel on Tatooine''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Duel on Tatooine]] between [[Maul|Darth Maul]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn]]
*[[Duel in Ben Kenobi's home]] between [[Luke Skywalker]] and [[Boba Fett]]
*[[Mission to Tatooine (Imperial Era)]]; [[Ezra Bridger]]'s mission that culminated in a [[lightsaber duel]] between Maul and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Duel on Tatooine/Legends|Duel on Tatooine]] between [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]
*During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]:
**[[Mission to Jabba's Palace (Clone Wars)/Legends#Duel on the Dune Sea|Duel on the Dune Sea]] between [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]
**[[Mission to Jabba's Palace (Clone Wars)/Legends#Duel outside of Jabba's Palace|Duel outside Jabba's Palace]] between [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] and three [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|MagnaGuards]]
*[[Duel on Tatooine (Imperial Period)]] between [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]]

===[[Infinities|Non-canon]]===
*[[Duel at the Lars homestead]] between [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]

{{Disambig}}

}}
